ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = "RP", ISPICKVAL(Status, "Reopened"), OR( NOT(ISCHANGED(ReopenReason__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(ReopenDateTime__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(EndDateTime)) ), NOT($Permission.IsAdmin) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Can't modify fields when status equals closed.
